A few things I've made

Product & Brand

YOU2 Travel App — Marketing Plan

Designed the marketing concept and content system for a travel booking app: themed campaigns, in-app discovery flows, and a referral/agent structure. Featured as event sponsor at IDTF 2023 and backed by OMT Group.

Role: Marketing Intern, 2019–2020
Product & Brand

WORK lounge AOYAMA — Coworking Space Website

Full landing page design for a Tokyo coworking space — brand identity, membership plans, a 3-step booking flow, and location info, in a warm mocha palette.

UI / Web design · Figma

TSUTSUMU — Recruitment Website

Careers site for a baby-goods brand — mission and values, business areas (baby products, photobooks, community), work environment perks like flex time and in-house daycare, and team interviews.

UI / Web design · Figma

The person behind it

About me

Clarissa

I'm Clarissa — born 2004, based between Jakarta and Japan. I design things that need to be both clear and a little charming, and I'm happiest when a project needs both a strategy brain and a visual eye.

ENFJ-APersonality (click to view)
JKT · IDBased in
3+ yrsMarketing & design

Grew up in Jakarta, currently spending time in Japan exploring design and content culture up close. Studying and working across marketing strategy and visual design — the projects on this site span both.

Photography, collecting small everyday objects, and picking apart brands I like to see why they work. I journal a lot of it into visual mood boards before it becomes a project.

I like starting from research — what's the actual problem — before touching a design tool. ENFJ-A means I default to thinking about the audience first: who's looking at this, and what do they need from it in the first five seconds.
